# Data folder

Generated by MVP-0 scripts. Most files gitignored except small structured metadata.

## Structure

```
data/
├── raw/iso/                  # Sampled ISO files (gitignored — ~100 files, ~50MB)
├── extracted/
│   └── iso_texts.jsonl       # Extracted text + metadata (gitignored — ~5-10MB)
├── criteria.json             # 60 KĐCLGD criteria structured (committed)
├── iso_processes.json        # 40+ ISO processes (committed)
└── ground_truth.json         # 20+ Hảo's labels (committed)
```

## Generated by

| File | Generator script |
|---|---|
| `raw/iso/` | `01_sample_docs.py` |
| `extracted/iso_texts.jsonl` | `02_extract_text.py` |
| `iso_processes.json` | `03_build_iso_metadata.py` |
| `criteria.json` | `04_build_criteria.py` (then 05_link enriches it) |
| `ground_truth.json` | `labeler.py` (Streamlit app) |
